sources.name: Wikipedia - Process (Sampha album)
sources.snippet: Process certified Silver by BPI (60,000 units). Globally sold over 500,000 copies as of 2023. No RIAA certification.

sources.name: Music Week - Sampha Lahai
sources.snippet: Process ended up selling half a million copies worldwide. Process has 73,567 UK sales to date.

sources.name: Chart data - US pure album sales
sources.snippet: US pure album sales: Sampha, Process 20,900 (total).

sources.name: Guggenheim - Samson Young
sources.snippet: Sound artist. Recipient of BMW Art Journey Award, Prix Ars Electronica, Uli Sigg Prize. No music sales certifications.

sources.name: Petal - Samson Young
sources.snippet: Multi-disciplinary artist working in sound, performance, video, and installation. No commercial music certifications.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Madres (album)
sources.snippet: Debut album released October 27, 2023 through Ninja Tune. No certifications found.

sources.name: Ninja Tune - Madres
sources.snippet: Debut album on independent label. No RIAA or other certifications found.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Steve Reich
sources.snippet: America's greatest living composer. Won two Grammy Awards and Pulitzer Prize. No RIAA certifications - minimalist/classical composer.

sources.name: Concord - Steve Reich
sources.snippet: Music for 18 Musicians and Different Trains earned two Grammy Awards. No RIAA certifications.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Hand. Cannot. Erase.
sources.snippet: Fourth solo studio album. UK Rock Albums chart #1. No RIAA certification. UK Gold certification (100,000 units) per forum sources.

sources.name: Louder Sound - Steven Wilson
sources.snippet: Wilson's solo albums got certified Gold in UK (100,000 copies). Not RIAA certified.

sources.name: BestSellingAlbums.org - Steven Wilson
sources.snippet: No reliable sales data available in database.

sources.name: Sound on Sound - Suzanne Ciani
sources.snippet: Despite topping over one million worldwide album sales with an established record label. Private Music sold more than a million copies of her albums.

sources.name: Seventh Wave - Seven Waves
sources.snippet: Seven Waves released 1982. No RIAA certifications found.

sources.name: RIAA - SZA Certifications
sources.snippet: Ctrl 3x Platinum (Feb 2026), SOS 8x Platinum (Aug 2025). Kill Bill and Snooze Diamond certified March 13, 2026. Over 60 total certifications.

sources.name: Billboard - SZA Diamond Certifications
sources.snippet: SZA earned first two RIAA Diamond certifications for Kill Bill and Snooze. 27 additional certifications. Total RIAA certification count over 60.

sources.name: RTTNews - SZA 100 Million Singles
sources.snippet: SZA becomes third Black female artist to surpass 100 million singles sold (120.5 million cumulative).

sources.name: ThatGrapeJuice - SZA Singles Sales
sources.snippet: Cumulative single sales of 120.5 million. 22 songs certified platinum, 5 gold in March 2026 batch.

sources.name: IFPI Global Charts
sources.snippet: SZA ranked #13 in 2023, #19 in 2024 and 2025 Global Artist Charts. SOS ranked #7 Global Album 2023, #5 Global Album 2024.

sources.name: IFPI - SOS Global Streaming Album 2023
sources.snippet: SOS was #2 on IFPI Global Streaming Album Chart 2023, #7 on Global Album Chart 2023.

sources.name: IFPI - Luther Global Single 2025
sources.snippet: Kendrick Lamar, SZA 'luther' ranked #8 on IFPI Global Single Chart 2025 with 1.18bn units.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Tarik Barri
sources.snippet: Dutch audiovisual composer based in Berlin. Creates visual music - collaborates with Thom Yorke, Nicolas Jaar. No music sales certifications.

sources.name: Gray Area - Tarik Barri
sources.snippet: Audiovisual composer and software developer. Performs live visuals - not a recording artist with certifications.

sources.name: SRO PR - Tash Sultana
sources.snippet: Jungle and Notion are ARIA accredited 2x Platinum. Mystik, Murder to the Mind and NOTION EP ARIA accredited Gold. Flow State won ARIA for Blues and Roots Album.

sources.name: Wikipedia - Flow State
sources.snippet: Flow State won ARIA Award for Best Blues and Roots Album 2018. Debuted at #2 on ARIA charts.

sources.name: Reggae Rise Up - Tash Sultana
sources.snippet: Debut album Flow State spawned Platinum singles (Mystik) and Gold-certified tracks (Murder to the Mind, Salvation, Free Mind, Cigarettes).

sources.name: Wikipedia - The Eraser
sources.snippet: Debuted at #3 UK, #2 US Billboard 200 (90,000 first week). UK Gold certified. No RIAA certification.

sources.name: BestSellingAlbums.org - The Eraser
sources.snippet: The Eraser sold 400,000 copies in 48 countries. UK Gold (100,000), Japan Gold (100,000), Canada Gold (50,000).

sources.name: Wikipedia - Anima (Thom Yorke album)
sources.snippet: Anima reached #5 UK Albums Chart, #1 Billboard Dance/Electronic Albums (10,000 units).

sources.name: Wikipedia - Tomorrow's Modern Boxes
sources.snippet: Released via BitTorrent. 4.4 million downloads by end of 2014. $6 per download bundle.
